strategies.description: Pattern around 'coding': 373 lessons share this theme. Example: Gemini-2.5-pro is a viable alternative for medium-complexity coding tasks when specific requirements are met.
Pattern around 'tasks': 235 lessons share this theme. Example: Gemini-2.5-flash is a highly effective and cost-efficient model for simple tasks like summarization, extraction, and rew...
Pattern around 'choice': 256 lessons share this theme. Example: For other:easy tasks, gemini-2.5-flash is a reliable, cost-effective choice (verified in production at ~100% quality).
Pattern around 'classification': 18 lessons share this theme. Example: Gemini-2.5-flash is highly effective for easy classification, summarization, extraction, and rewriting tasks.
Pattern around 'complex': 12 lessons share this theme. Example: gpt-4o-mini demonstrates superior consistency for complex coding tasks and data structure implementations.
